Heatwave In Karnataka? Bengaluru, Bidar, And Raichur May Touch 42°C While Coast Sees 100% Humidity
Last Updated:
Karnataka braces for rising heat from March 8-10, with temperatures in northern districts reaching 42 °C, while coastal regions could face extreme humidity.
1/8
Karnataka is witnessing a steady rise in temperatures as summer intensifies across the state. According to weather updates, several districts in North Karnataka are likely to experience extremely hot conditions between March 8 and March 10, with temperatures potentially touching 42°C.
